title: Refreshable materialized view not parsable after restart
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce. Only happens with refreshable materialized views.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() PRIMARY KEY (c0);
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW v0 REFRESH AFTER 1 MINUTE APPEND TO t0 (c0 Int) AS (((SELECT 1 c0) UNION DISTINCT (SELECT *)) EXCEPT (SELECT 2));
```
Then restart the server. The materialized view SQL file cannot be parsed back.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> Application: Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error (in file store/0cd/0cd747d0-f31f-44c9-82de-2f5eac6b0255/v0.sql): failed at position 234 (2) (line 11, col 8): 2
. Expected one of: alias cannot be here, end of query: Cannot parse definition from metadata file store/0cd/0cd747d0-f31f-44c9-82de-2f5eac6b0255/v0.sql. (SYNTAX_ERROR), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000266448f2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:136: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000001629f3e9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:171: DB::Exception::Exception(String const&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d8c5994
3. src/Common/Exception.h:179: DB::Exception::createDeprecated(String const&, int, bool) @ 0x000000000d8c58a9
4. src/Databases/DatabaseOnDisk.cpp:810: DB::DatabaseOnDisk::parseQueryFromMetadata(std::shared_ptr<Poco::Logger>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, String const&, String const&, bool) @ 0x000000001b783ec5
5. src/Databases/DatabaseOnDisk.cpp:782: DB::DatabaseOnDisk::parseQueryFromMetadata(std::shared_ptr<Poco::Logger>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IDisk>, String const&, bool, bool) @ 0x000000001b77bfc2
6. src/Databases/DatabaseOrdinary.cpp:271: void std::__function::__policy_func<void (String const&)>::__call_func[abi:se210105]<DB::DatabaseOrdinary::loadTablesMetadata(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, DB::ParsedTablesMetadata&, bool)::$_0>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*, String const&) @ 0x000000001b797cc2
7. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:508: ? @ 0x000000001b7852ab
8. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:508: ? @ 0x00000000163ec4b9
9. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:0: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>(void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*&&)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x00000000163f28a8
10. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:508: ? @ 0x00000000163e99c3
11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:0: void* std::__thread_proxy[abi:se210105]<std::tuple<std::unique_ptr<std::__thread_struct, std::default_delete<std::__thread_struct>>, void (ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>>(void*) @ 0x00000000163f054e
12. ? @ 0x00000000000a3d64
13. __clone3 @ 0x00000000001373bc
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 Int, c2 String, c3 Float) PRIMARY KEY (c1);
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c3 > 0.0;
CREATE TABLE t2 (c4 Int, c5 Date) PRIMARY KEY (c4);
key_bug_features: Refreshable materialized views fail to parse after server restart.
